prose:
The frontier-orbitals calculation on water using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase has been completed. The total electronic energy is approximately -76.4629 Hartree (or -2080.66 eV). The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy is about -8.6037 eV, and the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy is approximately 0.3370 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is approximately 8.94 eV.

The calculation converged successfully after 7 SCF cycles, and all checks show the result is trustworthy. The method used was `b3lyp/def2-tzvp` in PySCF, with a single-point computation in the gas phase.
